feature_definitions.topic_overlap: Rewards overlap between a user's interests and a post's extracted topics.
feature_definitions.skill_overlap: Rewards overlap between a user's explicit skills and a post's topics or framing.
feature_definitions.recent_engagement: Rewards topics similar to the user's recent engagement history.
feature_definitions.preferred_source: Adds a small bonus when the post source matches a source the user often reads.
feature_definitions.author_affinity: Reserved for a future affinity signal when users follow specific authors or creators.
feature_definitions.popularity_bucket: Adds a transparent bonus based on simplified popularity buckets rather than a learned popularity model.
feature_definitions.recency_bucket: Adds a transparent freshness bonus based on publish-time buckets.
feature_definitions.candidate_planning: Lets the ranking agent shortlist posts based on active topics, preferred sources, and light exploration before final reranking.
feature_definitions.diversity_reranking: Applies deterministic penalties when too many top posts repeat the same source or topic.

notes: This file is the demo stand-in for a larger real-world ranking-policy layer.
In production, ranking would also reflect feature engineering, learned ranking models, user-behavior signals, and policy rules.
The goal here is to make each feature visible so the end user can understand what each score component represents.
